title: Snowmobiler dies in Kootenay Pass avalanche as forecasters warn of high risks in B.C.’s backcountry
description: A snowmobiler has died in B.C.’s Interior after an avalanche in the Kootenay Pass area on Saturday, as forecasters warn hazardous conditions persist across the province.
content:
A snowmobiler has died in B.C.s Interior after an avalanche in the Kootenay Pass area on Saturday, as forecasters warn hazardous conditions persist across the province.
Avalanche Canada said two sno… [+3792 chars]
de: Schneemobilfahrer kommt bei Lawine am Kootenay Pass ums Leben, während Meteorologen vor hohen Risiken im Hinterland von B.C. warnen. Ein Schneemobilfahrer ist im Landesinneren von B.C. nach einer Lawine im Gebiet des Kootenay-Passes am Samstag ums Leben gekommen, während Meteorologen warnen, dass in der gesamten Provinz weiterhin gefährliche Bedingungen herrschen.
en: Snowmobiler dies in Kootenay Pass avalanche as forecasters warn of high risks in B.C.’s backcountry. A snowmobiler has died in B.C.’s Interior after an avalanche in the Kootenay Pass area on Saturday, as forecasters warn hazardous conditions persist across the province.
la: Snowmobiler moritur in Kootenay NIVIS Transi ut forecasters monent periculorum magnorum in B.C. in patria. A snowmobiler in B.C. Interiore mortuus est post montem cadentem in area Kootenay die Sabbati, ut forecasters monent condiciones ancipites per provinciam perstare.

title: Kings can't get past Avalanche despite individual standouts
description: Despite Anton Forsberg’s 35-save performance and Angus Booth’s first career goal, the Avalanche’s attack proved to be too much as the Kings lost in D.J. Smith’s first game as Los Angeles’ interim head coach.
content:
The Los Angeles Kings held their own against the Colorado Avalanche for most of the night, with multiple players getting individual highlights. In the end, it wasnt enough.

de: Trotz individueller herausragender Leistungen kommen die Kings nicht an Avalanche vorbei. Trotz Anton Forsbergs Leistung von 35 Paraden und Angus Booths erstem Karrieretor erwies sich der Angriff der Avalanche als zu viel, da die Kings in D.J. verloren. Smiths erstes Spiel als Interimstrainer von Los Angeles.
en: Kings can't get past Avalanche despite individual standouts. Despite Anton Forsberg’s 35-save performance and Angus Booth’s first career goal, the Avalanche’s attack proved to be too much as the Kings lost in D.J. Smith’s first game as Los Angeles’ interim head coach.

title: The Liberal Party’s current woes are many. Sidelining Victoria is one of them
description: The federal Liberal Party has not had a leader from Victoria since 1990. It says a lot about its electoral slide and its shift to the right.
content: The recent elevation of Angus Taylor to leader of the Liberal Party generated an expected avalanche of commentary. The reactions ranged over most points of the compass. In some, Taylor was depicted a… [+9230 chars]
de: Die aktuellen Probleme der Liberalen Partei sind vielfältig. Victoria ins Abseits zu drängen ist eine davon. Die Bundesliberale Partei hatte seit 1990 keinen Anführer mehr aus Victoria. Das sagt viel über ihren Wahlrückgang und ihren Rechtsruck aus.
en: The Liberal Party’s current woes are many. Sidelining Victoria is one of them. The federal Liberal Party has not had a leader from Victoria since 1990. It says a lot about its electoral slide and its shift to the right.
la: Factio Liberalis venae malae multae sunt. Sidelining Victoria una ex illis est. Factio Liberalis foederati ducem ex Victoria ab anno 1990 non habuit. Multa dicit de lapsus comitiorum et de eius mutatione in ius.
